tasks.subject: Task 1: Create archive directory structure
tasks.description: **Goal:** Create archive/v1/ and archive/v2/ directory trees with all subdirectories

tasks.subject: Task 2: Flatten V1 (old site) to static HTML and copy assets
tasks.description: **Goal:** Render all 4 V1 PHP pages to static HTML, fix absolute paths to relative, add .html to internal links, copy static assets

tasks.subject: Task 3: Flatten V2 (new site) to static HTML and copy assets
tasks.description: **Goal:** Render 2 V2 PHP pages to static HTML, fix absolute paths to relative, copy static assets

tasks.subject: Task 4: Clean root directory and update .gitignore
tasks.description: **Goal:** Remove old site directories, update .gitignore for clean slate

acceptanceCriteria: Only archive/ and git files at root

tasks.subject: Task 5: Final verification
tasks.description: **Goal:** Verify both archives are complete, self-contained, and browsable
